channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Brisbane inner-west bungalow sells for $2.525 million amid strong competition despite cooling market
item.description: An unrenovated 1920s bungalow in Brisbane’s inner-west suburb of Graceville has sold for $2.525 million after a competitive four-way auction, highlighting ongoing demand for well-located properties de...

item.title: Philippine Sports Commission launches inclusive grassroots golf program
item.description: The Philippine Sports Commission (PSC), in partnership with the National Golf Association of the Philippines (NGAP), has launched a groundbreaking grassroots golf program called “Fairway to the Future...

item.title: GameStop Proposes $56 Billion Acquisition of eBay with Potential Hostile Approach
item.description: On May 3, 2026, GameStop proposed to acquire eBay in a $56 billion cash-and-stock deal, offering $125 per share in a 50-50 mix of cash and GameStop stock. CEO Ryan Cohen stated that he is prepared to ...

item.title: Assessing the Impacts of a Potential Billy Bishop Airport Expansion
item.description: Toronto faces a critical decision regarding the proposed expansion of Billy Bishop Airport, which would increase its capacity fivefold. Currently, the airport occupies a prime public space on Toronto ...

item.title: Minister calls for coordinated national effort to protect children from abuse and exploitation
item.description: Social Development Minister Sisisi Tolashe has emphasised the need for urgent, coordinated action to address the growing problem of child abuse, neglect, and exploitation in South Africa. Speaking dur...

item.title: Ruto Faces Challenges in Maintaining Mt Kenya Support Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: On Monday, May 4, Kenya’s major newspapers reported on political developments in the Mt Kenya region ahead of the 2027 General Election. Murang’a governor Irungu Kang'ata announced he would not defend...

item.title: Plane collides with truck during approach to Newark with no serious injuries reported
item.description: A United Airlines jet bound for Newark Liberty International Airport collided with a bakery truck on the New Jersey Turnpike during its final approach. The incident occurred as Flight UA169, travellin...

item.title: Tanzania and Rwanda Strengthen Trade and Investment Ties, Reaching 644bn/-
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan announced that trade and investment cooperation between Tanzania and Rwanda has grown strongly, reaching around 644 billion shillings according to 2025 figures. During a ...

item.title: Father of Pune child victim seeks capital punishment as political row intensifies
item.description: The father of a four-year-old girl who was allegedly sexually assaulted and murdered in Maharashtra’s Pune district has publicly demanded the death penalty for the accused. In a self-recorded video re...

item.title: TikToker launches campaign for public-backed Spirit Airlines revival after sudden shutdown
item.description: Over the weekend, Spirit Airlines abruptly ceased operations, canceling all flights and laying off 17,000 employees, leaving passengers confused and stranded. The airline, known for its low fares, spa...

item.title: Government Mobilizes to Reopen Roads and Assist Communities Affected by Mayon Volcano
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. stated on Monday that the government is actively working to reopen all roads and thoroughfares affected by the unrest of Mayon Volcano. This effort aims to en...

item.title: Sammyro and Arap Uria Get Unique Access to Chelsea's Training Camp, Meet First-Team Players
item.description: Content creators Sammyro and Arap Uria had the opportunity of a lifetime when they visited Chelsea's Cobham training ground. The duo, known for their passion for English football and strong support fo...

item.title: Rudy Giuliani Hospitalized in Critical but Stable Condition
item.description: Former New York Mayor Rudy Giuliani, widely known as 'America's Mayor' for his leadership during the 9/11 attacks, has been hospitalized and is in critical but stable condition, according to his spoke...

item.title: TK Nciza seeks R5m in defamation lawsuit over Zahara’s death
item.description: The legal battle between former ANC Gauteng secretary Thembinkosi 'TK' Nciza and arts activist Bandile Magibili has intensified. Nciza is seeking a default judgment in a defamation claim against Magib...

item.title: Residents of FCT's Wadada Extension Displaced as Erosion Worsens
item.description: As the rainy season intensifies, residents of Wadada Extension in Abaji Area Council, Federal Capital Territory (FCT), are being forced to leave their homes due to the increasing damage caused by gull...

item.title: London sees first £10 pint amid rising beer prices
item.description: For the first time, the price of a pint in London has surpassed £10, reflecting a broader trend of increasing beer costs across the capital. Premium establishments, particularly in areas like Mayfair,...

item.title: eThekwini council rejects R3.9 billion vehicle upgrade over mismanagement concerns
item.description: During a council meeting on Thursday, eThekwini Municipality’s request for R3.9 billion to upgrade its ageing vehicle fleet was narrowly rejected, with 77 councillors voting against and 76 in favour. ...

item.title: Pakistan Faces Economic Strain Amid High Interest Rates and Global Shocks
item.description: The State Bank of Pakistan has increased the policy rate by 100 basis points to 11.5 percent, clearly signalling that stability is being prioritised over economic growth. With inflation hitting double...

item.title: Australia and Japan navigate strategic independence while maintaining US alliance
item.description: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s visit to Australia comes at a time of heightened geopolitical uncertainty, triggered by US-Israel actions against Iran and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz,...

item.title: West Bengal Assembly Election 2026 counting begins amid TMC-BJP contest
item.description: The article covers the start of counting for the West Bengal Assembly Election 2026, with the Trinamool Congress aiming for a fourth straight term and the BJP seeking to make a breakthrough in the sta...
